notes.New Lead: Active deals in Sales Qualification pipeline, New Lead stage (across ZAR/GBP/USD)
notes.Demo/Pilot: Active deals in Sales Conversion pipeline, Demo/Pilot stage
notes.Negotiation: Active deals in Sales Conversion pipeline, Negotiation stage
notes.Agreed: Paying schools confirmed by Rus (Customer Account Management Won: Onboarding + Activated)
notes.advances: Deals modified into Demo/Pilot or Negotiation in last 7 days
notes.new_customers: Non-churned deals modified into an Agreed-type stage in last 7 days
notes.email_sent: Sum of send_amt across last 10 campaigns
notes.new_contacts: New contacts added this calendar month
